name: Cole Spring Plaza
approxRentRange: $2,499 (2BR observed on RentCafe and ApartmentList as of June 2026; 1BR $1,775-$1,915)
bathroomsNote: 1BR units are 1BA; 2BR units are listed at 1,348 sq ft; bathroom count per 2BR not confirmed across sources

notes.doorman: Multiple independent listing sources (RentCafe, ApartmentList, search aggregators) consistently describe a 24-hour front desk or 24-hour concierge. The leasing office itself is not 24-hour (Mon-Fri 9am-6pm, Sat 10am-5pm), but front desk staffing is separately confirmed as round-the-clock.
notes.pool: First-search results describe a 'neighboring swimming pool,' which implies the pool may be adjacent to but not owned by the property. RentCafe explicitly states 'Pool: Not available at this property.' ApartmentList lists pool as an amenity, but aggregator data can reflect outdated or inaccurate entries. 'Unclear' is the honest call until the official site confirms.
notes.inUnitLaundry: Multiple sources consistently report shared on-site laundry facility only; no in-unit washer/dryer mentioned anywhere.
notes.balcony: Private patios/balconies listed as a unit feature across RentCafe, ApartmentList, and search aggregators. Availability may vary by unit.
notes.petFriendly: Cats only; up to 2 per household; $250 refundable deposit per cat; $25/month pet rent per cat. No dogs allowed.
notes.unitClimate: AC is listed as a unit feature and air conditioning appears to be in-unit. However, 'most utilities included in rent' (per RentCafe) suggests heat may be building-provided. Unit-level control over both heat and AC is not confirmed; marked Unclear.
notes.wellMaintained: No independent review data accessed. Apartment was built in 1967 and has 10 stories and 278 units. Condition cannot be confirmed without resident reviews.
notes.has2BRor1BRDen: 2BR floor plans confirmed. No 1BR+den floor plan specifically identified; sources list studio, 1BR, and 2BR layouts.
notes.packageRoom: Package receiving services confirmed across multiple sources.
notes.gym: Fitness center confirmed across multiple sources.
